title: Agent-utility comparison record (tempdoc 624)
description: Condition-paired sibling of the 623 benchmark release. Projects over agent-eval runs cohort-identical on every axis except `condition` (with-tool vs. without-tool), one cell per (corpus, agent_model), aggregating over seed. A separate canonical record, NOT a metric family inside the single-cohort 623 release.

composed_at.description: ISO timestamp (passed in; scripts can't call Date.now).

cohort.description: The harness identity held fixed across the whole record (the agent_cohort_key surface). EXCLUDES corpus/model/condition/seed (range axes). The search_config_cohort_key co-varies with condition and is recorded here, not in the pairing key (R2).

agent_cohort_key.description: SHA over {git_sha, cli_version, mcp_tool_surface_hash, judge, prompt_template_hash, decoding, eval_limits}.

cli_version.description: Claude Code CLI version (HAL/Evaluation-Cards provenance: harness version).

mcp_tool_surface_hash.description: Hash of the tools/list payload the agent was offered (R8).

judge.description: Hybrid scorer identity: {kind: substring-em | llm-judge, model?, version?, prompt_hash?}.

search_config_cohort_key.description: 623 config_cohort_key of the with-tool search backend (null for the without-tool arm).

hardware.description: Stable hardware projection (gpu/vram/driver/ort), reused from release._hardware_projection.

conditions.description: Condition semantics (tempdoc 346): A=file tools only, B=file+JustSearch, C=JustSearch only.

measured.description: {corpus_slug: {agent_model: cell}} — one paired comparison cell per (corpus, model).

accuracy.description: Binary outcome via McNemar's paired test over pooled (seed, qid) observations.

tokens_unique.description: cache_creation (unique-content) tokens — the contamination-robust headline (D-1). Per-arm distribution (median+p95), not a single mean.

seed_count.description: Distinct seeds aggregated (the statistical power knob; >=5 is the literature floor).

confidence_tier.description: Honest confidence label carried through (mirrors 623/the register).

contamination_class.description: Corpus contamination class (C-5) as a first-class label, not a footnote.

external_baselines.description: CITED external constants (FRAMES, BFCL-V4, CodeScaleBench, PHMForge, A-RAG) — never a projection of our runs; pinned by source+version.
